name: protadjust
title: ProtAdjust — Protein Abundance Adjustment
summary: Adjust protein abundance using z-score, RINT, OLS regression, per-protein regression, or Protrider outlier detection.

inputSpec.name: input_parquet
inputSpec.label: Input proteomics parquet
inputSpec.help: Parquet file with samples as rows and proteins as columns.

inputSpec.name: index_col
inputSpec.label: Sample identifier column
inputSpec.help: Name of the sample identifier column in the input parquet (default: sample).

inputSpec.name: covariates_parquet
inputSpec.label: Covariates parquet (regression only)
inputSpec.help: Parquet file of covariates (samples x covariates). Required for regression.

inputSpec.name: covariate_index_col
inputSpec.label: Covariate sample identifier column
inputSpec.help: Sample identifier column in the covariates parquet (default: eid).

inputSpec.name: n_pcs
inputSpec.label: Proteomics PCs to include as covariates (regression only)
inputSpec.help: Number of proteomics PCs to add as extra covariates in regression.

inputSpec.name: protein_covariates_parquet
inputSpec.label: Per-protein covariates parquet (protein-regression only)
inputSpec.help: Parquet file of per-protein covariates, e.g. PRS scores (samples x proteins). Required for protein-regression.

inputSpec.name: pval_dist
inputSpec.label: P-value distribution (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: t: fit t-distribution and transform z-scores to N(0,1) (default). t-raw: return raw t z-scores. normal: fit normal distribution.

inputSpec.name: max_nas
inputSpec.label: Max missing value fraction (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Proteins with a higher fraction of missing values are dropped before the autoencoder runs (default: 0.3).

inputSpec.name: no_autoencoder_training
inputSpec.label: Skip autoencoder training (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Skip autoencoder training and use PCA initialisation only.

inputSpec.name: n_layers
inputSpec.label: Autoencoder hidden layers (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Number of hidden layers in the autoencoder (default: 1).

inputSpec.name: n_epochs
inputSpec.label: Training epochs (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Maximum number of autoencoder training epochs (default: 1000).

inputSpec.name: find_q_method
inputSpec.label: Latent dimension method (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Method used to determine the latent dimension (default: OHT).

inputSpec.name: no_init_pca
inputSpec.label: Disable PCA initialisation (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Disable PCA initialisation of autoencoder weights.

inputSpec.name: common_degrees_freedom
inputSpec.label: Common degrees of freedom (protrider only)
inputSpec.help: Fit a single degrees-of-freedom parameter shared across all proteins.
